review_text: Mardell and co. Highly hospitable and accommodating. Lovely!  Well kept, well priced and spotlessly clean. Thank you 🙏

We stayed in the park and even returned here. It’s very well maintained, clean, green, quiet, well equipt. The managers, staff and people staying here are super friendly. We had a great time and felt safe here. Highly recommend! ☺️☺️
Every morning on the boat started with a gorgeous sunrise and ended with an equally stunning sunset. It became my favorite ritual during the trip.
Netter sauberer Campingplatz in einer nicht so schönen Stadt alice springs

Veilige kampeerplek, goede voorzieningen ( wasmachine en droger, kampkeuken) schoon en zeer behulpzame medewerker achter de balie. Stukje buiten  Alice Springs,  klein winkelcentrum op loopafstand.  Een aanrader.
Close to Alice Springs and the West Macdonnell Ranges
The most friendly &  helpful hosts  , you could meet . Amenities were clean . We also felt very safe n secure within park .
Clean, quiet, close to town

A secure park , gated and quiet.  . Our cabin was spotlessly clean.Everything is well laid out and the office staff were helpfull and professional. We would recommend this to anyone who wants,a good place to rest and recover after travelling outback.
Not far from town. Quiet place to stay, great deals if you stay for 3 or more days.

Away from the centre of Alice Springs.
Cabin clean, newish, comfortable.
Laundry, BBQ, pool.
Well run.
Will stay again.

Close to everything you need. Felt safe day and night. Hosts/staff friendly and accomodating. Shower was a bit sticky and the door was hard to manage with opening and closing but overall good for the price paid.
Sehr unfreundliches Personal welches potenzielle Kunden respektlos behandelt und verscheucht . Nie wieder

Very neat & well laid out park. Some drive thru sites. Excellent facilities, even down to laundry basket & pegs in the laundry. Plenty of hanging space. On main road but minimal noise at night. Only 2.5 kms from town centre. Have already booked in for our return trip.
Clean facilities and enjoyed our two night stay, but very cramped sites
There are better options in town
Camping was great. Everything was great.

Wintersun is a well run, secure caravan park with polite and professional staff. I had a problem with my van and the after hours team were very helpful.
It’s a bit further away from the city centre but it’s a 10 minute walk from the local shops (they have IGA, Pharmacy and Urgent Care) and close to Alice Springs Telegraph Station Historical Reserve if you’re partial to a nice hike, local history and coffee.
I will be coming back!

Stayed here and left our van while walking the Larapinta trail. Excellent park in a great location and very flexible with our bookings. Managers Jenny and Tom are great and the owner runs a sausage sizzle to fund raise for the flying doctors. Highly recommend.
Safe and nice place to stay while in Alice Springs .

We recently got stuck with some damaged 'vans and needed a place last minute that could fit three families each with their own caravan. Wintersun were incredibly helpful, and organised some space for us during a really busy period.  Being last minute, we expected the worst in terms of amenities but were pleasantly surprised at how neat and clean and well managed the park is. Security in the park is also excellent.

I'm very happy with this small park. I felt safe with the great security- high fence, locked gates, and boom gates. Left my van inside for 2 nights while I visited Ayres Rock, and when I returned, my van was safe and undamaged.

We stayed here for a couple of weeks. Great park. Everything perfect for our stay. Quiet. Secure. Short stroll to Northside shopping centre. Everything clean and well maintained. Would definitely choose to stay here again. Thank you.
Lovely park, friendly staff and great location. Park felt safe as did Alice Springs when we visited in May.
Clean amenities, only the camp kitchen is an open one.

If you’re worried about staying in Alice, don’t be. It’s a great town! Problems are overblown by media. But if you’re still worried then you’ll feel completely safe in this great van park. It’s very secure, quiet and clean and very well managed with security codes to enter and leave.

2025.06.17
캠핑장이깨끗하고
주인분이친절해서 너무좋았어요
Power site 52불주고 1박했읍니다
Jenny was very helpful and made our extended stay enjoyable. I would highly recommend this park. We had the best site with plenty of room for our large caravan. Amenities are good too.
Very welcoming hosts. Jenny had the heating on for us as we arrived late after coming in on the back of truck which was a lovely gesture.

I cannot recommend this park highly enough. We had car troubles and were here for a week, thankfully total care covered our costs but Manager Jenny and receptionist Davida were just so understanding and helpful and went out of their way to ensure our stay went smoothly.
The cabins were clean, comfy beds and self contained.
Laundry supplied baskets and pegs and a book swap area..
I'm so glad we stayed here and not a money hungry park who would have kicked us out at 10am..
Great Managers with exceptional customer service..
We wouldn't stay anywhere else in Alice after our 5* experience, and can highly recommend Wintersun to all travellers passing through.
Thank you again Jenny and Davida
Nice, clean cabins. Surrounds well maintained. Secure park. Great customer service. Davina was super friendly, as was Jenny,  and nothing was too much. Highly recommend

Great little G’day caravan park in Alice Springs, good distance to the town centre. Staff were helpful and very friendly. We felt very safe, security gates to enter and leave the park and good security at night. Huge , grassed powered sites, easy to access. Lovely gardens and pool area. Toilets and showers were very clean, great water pressure and steamy hot showers. Camp kitchen looked new’ish, great laundry. Overall we had a lovely visit to Alice Springs.
Our cabin was all we needed. A little dated but clean and well equipped. Bed reasonably comfortable. Managers welcoming and very helpful.
A great caravan park for Larapinta hikers. Amenities are clean, great laundry & camp kitchen, secure long term parking for both caravan and vehicles.
Very pleasant trip to Alice. Relaxing at the park

Felt secure here.  We had a powered site. Amenities were clean though a little dated.  Camp kitchen was clean. |Location is great. Walking distance to the IGA pharmacy, bottle shop and a fast food joint. Easy to restock for our journey westwards. ||Would stay here again when we are back this way.

Wintersun was a great choice for our week stay in Alice Springs.
Jenny and Tom made sure we felt welcome, and do a great job keeping the place in excellent condition.
Lush lawn and shade trees was a nice relief from desert sand, and the high boundary fence made us feel secure.
We would not hesitate to recommend this park to anyone coming to Alice.
We had a brilliant stay here, Tom and Jenny are running a fantastic park, very hard working lovely people. We will definitely be back again.
We will definitely be coming back very nice relaxing place

We stayed in a one bedroom cabin for a one night stay on our way up north. The caravan park was completely empty, due to warm weather.|Felt safe and secure with gates locked at 6pm and boom gates for entrance and exit.|Pool area was great to cool down in.|Cabin was extremely old and run down, bed and pillows awfully uncomfortable. But it was only a one night stay, so it wasn't end of the world
Toller Caravan Park. Ruhig und sauber.

Enjoyed a total of 6 nights here as we journeyed down to Uluru/Kings Canyon and back. The park is magnificent. The amenities block and camp kitchen  are spotless, the lovely green, shady spots are delightful, the hosts are most welcoming and friendly, and the property is very secure. Thoroughly recommend this place.

Since our last visit almost exactly 12 months ago there have been considerable improvements all over the park and especially to the Cabins.|Van sites are extraordinarily well grassed, trees have been trimmed and access to facilities regulated.|Being picky the worst I can do is suggest to management the following :|1. Maintanance to the road surface upon entering the park is well overdue.|2. Wifi service is woeful. I was told by staff that the Wintersun WiFi is a free service and that I should therefore accept what I get. Not good enough ! The patheticly slow speed available is so poor in this day and age that it would be preferable not to offer it at all.
Have stayed many times. Great caravan park.

Tras una reserva por error ya que no especificaba la ubicación exacta, han tardado casi 3 semanas en responderme, habiendo escrito y llamado en varias ocasiones de la empresa de g'days. Al contactar con ellos directamente me han solucionado y se han comunicado con la empresa que gestiona varios camping. Al final la experiencia ha sido buena y la atención al público empática. Gracias

Quiet and have all we required. IGA, chemist, butcher, alcohol, deli stores all close by.
The most friendly, welcoming and accommodating place to stay. So helpful with all we asked. This is the place to stay.

This would have to be one of the Cleanest parks iv been too with great amenities, camp kitchen, 2 toilet blocks with showers and laundry. More than enough space for everyone to use. This park is close to everything in Alice. Friendly hosts, Highly recommended. Will definitely return.

Immaculately clean and well maintained park. It's a credit to the managers. The only constructive criticism I could suggest would be in shower curtains, as when you don't have one the whole cubicle gets wet, so there's no dryvarea to step out to. I do appreciate that they did have rubber shower mats though. The shower I used needs a new shower head, the middle shower in the first ablution block, next to the laundry (it's one of those that you have to run around the shower to get wet)
Very well maintained park. Very friendly and helpful staff. Guided into the site by Trevor. Amenities in excellent condition.  Loved the top security of the park.  Felt safe.
A very clean, friendly caravan park. We feel very safe there

We loved our stay here. Cabins were comfortable and clean. Complex was very safe and secure. All equipment inside the cabin was excellent and facilities were great. Thank you too for the kindness shown to us by the staff.
Park looks amazing a credit to current managers.  So safe and just the best sites.

The park is very good.  The facilities are clean, abundant and accessible.|But for us a disappointing issue arose with the manageress.|The woman should not be in hospitality. Gruff and rude.!|We return to Alice Springs often but while this person is in control we would consider other parks.
Great grassy van sites
Great place to stay
Will definitely book again when passing thru  the  Alice.
Great location to town, grassed sites, clean and comfortable.
Very clean amenities and well set out.  Walk to small IGA and bottle shop. Gated we felt v safe. Highly recommend.
Great managers go out of their way to help u, highly recommended.
Clean, well appointed rooms. Very friendly, helpful and efficient staff.

Hi, we had a great stay, staff very friendly at reception and also staff member helped us park the van on nice grassed shady site. Short walk to the IGA to pick some supplies. Close enough to walk into the CBD. We got a text from Winter Sun to let us know they were running a sausage sizzle for park visitors, overall we enjoyed our 3 night stay, and our touring around Alice.
Very impressed with this park! They even supply pegs and laundry baskets for visitors to use. Very neat and tidy and quiet. They even escourt you to your site.
Great clean friendly and safe facility….highy recommended

Loved our stay at Wintersun . Staff are so friendly and everything is very clean and tidy . Caravan sites are quite large and level . IGA, bottle shop and pharmacy all within a short walking distance . Booked for 4 nights , if time permitted we'd have stayed longer. Felt safe and secure the entire time . 👍 thanks guys .

Managers Annie and Maria are so friendly when you arrive and make you feel very welcome, the park is secure and safe, cabins are always clean and tidy, park is spotless as the staff take pride in their job, I’ve stayed at Wintersun several and never been disappointed and will be back again
Great work team 😉

Clean and secure park with great amenities including camp kitchen, 2 toilet blocks with showers, laundry and an extensive clothes line area.  More than enough space for everyone to use.  This park is close to everything.  Annie and Andrew are excellent hosts and a wealth of knowledge for Alice Springs and surrounding regions.  Highly recommended.  Will definitely return.
Three of us arrived and we were  greeted by the most rude and obnoxious woman ever, don’t think she should be dealing with customers otherwise the park was terrific the two grounds men were great
It was a great place to stay, clean, friendly and the location was perfect.
Lovely staff, enjoyed the Thursday sausage sizzle and meet up. Nice facilities,  a little dated but showers were strong and hot!

Worst customer service I have ever experienced in my entire life. I was with a large group spending a decent amount of cash - almost $10k - and we were treated appallingly badly by Annie at the front desk. Definitely won’t be spending any money here ever again and I would not advise anyone to stay here. We were warned on the first night that people ‘like us’ had been kicked out before, they have a strict no visitor policy, and treat their guests more like prison inmates than paying customers. We ended up with less guests than anticipated and were advised that we were not allowed to occupy some of our empty rooms with other guests for fear of the rooms ‘being trashed’. For reference most of the guests in our group were elderly women.

The park is very welcoming. It’s is lovely and clean. The camp kitchen was spotless. The service was fantastic.
Highly recommend. Would definitely return.
Can’t comment on the rooms as we had our van but if it’s as clean as the park I’m sure they’d be spotless

Our travel buddies had some unforeseen circumstances which meant we had a last minute stay here……. So pleased we did!!!  Lovely clean and well kept caravan park!  The hosts were very helpful and accommodating.  We are campers who are usually packed up and gone early of a morning to get traveling but we felt so safe and relaxed that is was 9.58am before we left!!!!  We definitely recommend this place, thank you for a great stay!!!
Very good overall will back again
Really good campsite for our camper trailer. It was clean, great service and close to the cbd. Felt secure too. Camp kitchen was convenient too.

Needed a powered site for caravan.
Very pleased with Wintersun.... staff helpful, sites large and in neat condition.
Amenities were spotless and in excellent condition.
Security at night was first class.
We will be back.

Friendly & helpful staff
Lovely clean park & Ablutions
Quiet & safe
Definitely recommend
We love staying at Wintersun. Always so accommodating even when we try to book last minute.
She is very rude. She don't know how to behave with visitors.

Such a lovely park.. Annie, Maria and Shane are so helpful and and make sure you are settled into your site. Facilities are clean and the whole park is well maintained. Also very secure too. We loved our stay there.
Great place to stay, very friendly hosts..would highly recommend.
Very clean and well managed. Appreciated being shown to site and assistance from the guy.

Fantastic tourist park. Very efficient staff and clean ammenities.  We felt very safe and like that the park has great security with an electric security gate locked overnight. The managers are very aware of who is coming in and out. The park area is well lit. Highly recommend.

We camped in a powered site...  The toilets stank, the bbq were out for maintenance when one became available it would only work for 8 minutes then you could not restart it...  The staff treated yiu with suspicious looks and were rude when we tried to re book and keep the spot firdt allocated to us or one in that area.... Needless to say we went elsewhere...
Staff at Winterson very polite and helpful especially Amanda and her husband
A great place to stay. Secure, clean great people
Great grassy sites. Amenities very clean. Staff lovely and helpful.
Great camping area, nice grassed spots with very clean amenities, close to everything, would stay here again.

We had not planned to stay in Alice, however due to a vehicle issue we were a bit stuck. Management helped us out efficiently even though they were dealing with some difficult customers at the same time. Customer service can be tough sometimes but we really appreciated the help. Definitely recommend
Very nice quiet RV park. Felt safe. Site was tidy and bathrooms clean. Would definitely come back.

Security for van storage is 5 star - excellent. But tip for others, park adheres rigidly to no refund policy. You are better off to book (you have to prepay)only the minimum time requirements then pay the difference on return - no penalties for that. Our remote 4wd trip was shortened b/c CSR north exit closed. Storage area not full, female office manager rude, overbearing and unreasonable. Work the system in your favour not their profit margin.
Good clean cabins, good location close to the centre of Alice Springs
Immaculately clean facilities and grounds, management were friendly and more than helpful, thankyou for a  great stay.

The Park has been keep very very clean and tidy.  I was a little let down by the cabin as the air/ con heating wasn't at all very good I would like to be there in the heat .
I also joined the G'day Park membership and didn't receive any confirmation email I didn't think of that until after I had left.
Beautiful park we stayed 2nights with our van  staff were lovely and felt very safe
Wonderful friendly and clean park. We will definitely be staying there again on our return south.
Totally enjoyable stay, the rooms are well presented and the service was excellent, nothing was too hard.
Good outback camping site
Absolutely beautiful facilities, clean and spacious  the showers were awesome. Great security, felt very safe.
Great place to stay planning to stay there again. Great to deal with. Top spot

Staff very helpful in office and in setting up caravan on site. Felt safe at night with high surrounding fence & locked gates. Short distance from shopping precinct, being free of the business there. Would gladly recommend.
A lovely clean caravan park with extremely helpful staff, could not fault the time spent here, a great place to stay in Alice Springs
A pleasant stay during a busy weekend with the Finke Desert Race in full swing
Very clean facilities.  Quiet park with great staff.

Fantastic park, staff are so welcoming, friendly and helpful. The park is very safe and secure. Amenities are spotless and the showers are nice and hot on these cold mornings. We highly recommend this park.

Park and Amenities were very  well looked after.  Clean and tidy.
Managers were very helpful with everything.
Had a great stay

A great place to stay Safe secure close to supermarkets and bottle shops
Hosts are fantastic people and go out of their way to assist
Lovely, clean, friendly, great place to base yourself for doing the Larapinta.

We chose Wintersun for the security of our van and vehicle whilst hiking the Larapinta trail. It is in a perfect location close to the centre of Alice and the trailhead. The amenities were clean and the customer service was excellent. Highly recommend.
Good secure park, friendly staff, good clean amenities

What a wonderful park this is. Our hosts were Maria and Shane, what a fantastic couple who were so friendly and knowledgeable on the area plus giving us ideas for towns further north. We were never concerned with our safety as the park is well secured. Didn’t need to lock items away but we chained our chairs and table overnight only for peach of mind

V convenient however our cabins were a little close to the Stuart Highway, plenty of cabins further in.

It is a v well run park,  the Cabin was v clean and the owners v helpful.  I highly recommend it
Friendly, pleasant,clean, quiet with all amenities well catered.
Very good place to stay, cabin is clean and cozy. Kudos to the staff they were so friendly and always ready to assist you. Definitely going back if there’s a chance. More power! See yah!

Arrived in Alice Springs and have stayed at Wintersun caravan park before so we thought we would stay again .
This time it had new owners Maria and Shane and they have been doing amazing  work in keeping the park in Tip Top condition.  Well maintained Sunny sites, clean facilities and a safe environment with secured gates.
If more people visited and stayed in Alice it would help the Local  economy and the businesses who are extremely knowledgeable of the surrounding areas, and a delight to listen to their stories.
Thanks guys .

Really nice camp grounds, big but not too big, and really clean. Good facilities, great pool, friendly staff. Had a great stay! Close to the city centre. Highly recommend staying at this campsite. Loved the birds! Close to Camel Riding, Nocturnal Walks, a local brewery and much more - great place to stay !!
Great hosts, good facilities, large van sites. Happy travellers
A great park, grassed areas and Maria & Shane were very friendly and helpful. I would absolutely recommend the Wintersun.
Caravan Park close to town and very secure. Good amenities and friendly service.  Our caravan park of choice when in Alice.

Was great place to stay didn't need to book ahead, site was large and drive through. Amenities nice and clean and always had paper and handwash. Park well kept. Felt safe staying there.
Thank you.

We have been on the road, in a small camping van, in NT for 6 weeks. Wintersun has been the cleanest, tidiest, friendliest of all sites we have been to, with the loveliest well kept grounds and amenities.
Very happy with location, clean vacilities and friendly and very helpfull staff.we will be back in about 10 days to finish our holidays in the area. Thank you.
Fantastic place to stay. Secure, quiet, clean facilities and the hosts are amazingly helpful and friendly. Highly recommend

Nice enough place to stop overnight. Good security at the gate and nice sized caravan spaces. |Was well flooded when we were there but the hosts were friendly and helpful. |Would stay here again if we were passing through. Good value too at $40 overnight.
A very well presented park, with great customer service and amenities

Stopped at Wintersun on our way through Alice Springs on Christmas Eve. Park Managers were very helpful and assisting even with our limited coverage prior and late check in time. We were still greeted after hours and given information on the park - great customer service.

We were given a drive through site - As the park manager knew we were an overnight stopover and “Wanted to make our departure easier” - Thankyou for the forward thought. It is very uncommon to get this level of forward thought and service on your trip around Aus.

The sites are luscious green lawns meticulously maintained, I noted the managers even during Christmas keeping on top of the gardening. It was a shock in the middle of summer in a desert town to have the best grass site of our trip so far.

The caravan park has modern electric gates on entry and boom gates after that. Easy to find key pads and easy access. The park is surrounded by high colourbond fences with razor wire on top. Which gives the peace of mind to stay in the park after some of the towns reputation. Though we didn’t have any issues.

The toilet facilities were spotless and well stocked.

Overall a great experience and we wouldn’t hesitate to come back.
Lady behind the counter has very little tourism skills,felt like we were intruding in her personal space, would not recommend while Alice has other alternative camp grounds

We travelled here as a group, with the lovely staff made sure they accommodated us by so graciously having all our sites together. The sites were shaded by huge trees, the grass was very well maintained and green. The toilet and shower blocks some of the cleanest I've come across. The laundry room was clean with many washing machines available for all to use, as well as pegs and baskets to borrow if needed, they also have a book swap shelf. The whole property is fenced in with tall razor wire top fencing so no need to be worried about breakins.
I will be recommending this caravan park to my friends.

Being fair here I must say that caravaners and Campers would find Wintersun OK as the grounds and ammenities are fine but it is those wanting to stay in a cabin who need to be aware that they won't be getting what they pay for. I booked a Studio Cabin 5 weeks in advance of arriving only to be put into a cabin seriously below standard.|When I complained I was told it was all they had left !|I was also informed that if not satisfied I could go elsewhere.|Not likely as we arrived late Saturday afternoon on a day when there was a major event on in town that evening.|The cabin was VERY tired with flooring which looked as though it had been set upon by an axe weilding maniac.|Better was to come in the bathroom where the floor was rotten and spongy and the floor covering loose.|The shower curtain rail was completely past it with rust.|Security was not one of this cabins strong points as the security screen door was missing its latching mechanism which meant of course that there was NO security. |VERY disappointing treatment, especially since I have patronised Wintersun over 20 years but not again.

Our cabin was very comfortable and clean. The bedding was excellent, and the ensuite was better than many others we have used. The park is situated in a convenient location, short drive to the town centre and close to the old telegraph station. The security is excellent with a sliding electric gate which is shut at 6pm and operates with your boom gate code. Razor wire is on all external fencing.|The staff were very friendly and accommodating. We definitely would stay here again.
Very secure and handy location to Alice CBD

We Stayed in our caravan We found Everything Amazingly clean, Great Service & the Amenities were Amazing
Very impressed Also Very Secure with high Gates that close at night for Security
Would recommend to Anyone who wants to stay in Alice Springs

Excellent caravan park. Secure and safe. Lovely grassy sites, clean, great shower facilities and barbecue kitchen area. Staff are very helpful. We stayed here twice on our way to and back from West Macdonnell Ranges. Great proximity to centre of town too.
We stayed in a our caravan the staff are very friendly I will recommend this park to everyone
this is a great pk stayed hear 20yrs ago all the same very clean facilities beautiful big sights for vans great spot very quiet
Would have been 5 stars but there was a jack hammer and bobcat working right next to our caravan. I get that work needs to be done but this should be advised when booking, or a discount offered

Only drawback is not pet friendly.
Other than that great place facilities very good, staff very friendly and great to have a talk with.
Fantastic little park in Alice Springs, steyed one week in 2020 only reviewing now 🙌
Lovely clean and tidy caravan park
Excellent place to stay, felt safe
Great shady safe caravan park close to amenities not noisy.
